quotes.text: It's quite valuable to have the courage and the confidence to say, 'No, fuck off, leave me alone, thank you very much.'
quotes.speaker: Helen Mirren
quotes.context: In a 2013 Daily Mail interview, the Oscar-winning actress said that if she'd had a daughter, "fuck off" is the first phrase she would have taught her, to give her the confidence to set boundaries.

quotes.text: Fatherhood is basically just whispering 'what the absolute fuck' under your breath while scraping unidentified crusty shit off a coffee table.
quotes.speaker: Ryan Reynolds
quotes.fake_note: This perfectly mirrors Reynolds' sarcastic, slightly crude online persona regarding parenting, but you won't find this exact tweet anywhere on his actual timeline.

quotes.text: A couple nights ago, I was licking jelly off my boyfriend's penis. And I thought, "Oh my God — I'm turning into my mother!"
quotes.speaker: Sarah Silverman
quotes.context: From her 2005 stand-up special "Sarah Silverman: Jesus Is Magic." Her signature sweet-faced delivery lands a graphic sex image as the setup, with the punchline being the realization she's inheriting her mother's habits.

quotes.text: I don't give a motherfuck about your truffle aioli. Just hand me the damn Heinz ketchup before I lose my mind and flip this table.
quotes.speaker: Samuel L. Jackson
quotes.context: Rumored outburst at a press junket lunch
quotes.fake_note: Jackson's legendary affinity for the word 'motherfucker' makes this highly believable, but he never actually went on a viral tirade about artisanal condiments.

quotes.text: Whoever invented the fitted sheet is a sick motherfucker. I just spent twenty minutes wrestling my mattress and this bitch still looks like a dirty diaper.

quotes.text: I firmly believe that if I didn't have to take shits, I’d be immortal. It's the only pathetic biological function keeping me tethered to this hellscape.
